primary_intent: First-pass single-equity research on AAPL with full thesis system
routing_basis: Single-equity first pass with the full thesis system; serves as the canonical single-equity golden few-shot example case.
routing_mismatch_risk: Low — scope is a research package, not a live trade call; the actionability-bridge stays research-bound with explicit invalidation.
expected_output_package: investment-memo.md, evidence-log.csv, expectation-map.csv, thesis-ledger.md, decision-log.csv, actionability-bridge.md
followup_questions: Which variable should anchor the thesis into the next quarter: Services growth/margin resilience or iPhone-cycle continuation? (Rung B -> expectation-map consensus proxy)
If AAPL decisively breaks the ~245 support, does that trigger a full thesis downgrade review or only a technical-context overlay refresh? (Rung C -> thesis_state / readiness_level)
Before live use ahead of stale_after 2026-07-13, refresh the missing valuation anchor (source_gap) first or the tariff/margin disclosure delta? (Rung A -> calculation_depth / readiness_level)
